component.name: keyroost
component.summary: Program Token2 Molto2 TOTP tokens and manage FIDO2/OATH/OpenPGP/PIV security keys

description.p: keyroost is an independent, dual-licensed (MIT/Apache-2.0) toolchain for programming the Token2 Molto2 / Molto2v2 programmable TOTP hardware token, and for managing common security keys over their standard applets.
It speaks to devices over PC/SC (smart-card readers) and USB HID (FIDO), and supports:

ul.li: Token2 Molto2 / Molto2v2 TOTP slot programming
FIDO2 / CTAP credential management and PIN handling
PIV (NIST SP 800-73-4) management: keys, certificates, PIN/PUK/management-key

description.p: A command-line tool (keyroostctl) and a desktop GUI (keyroost) share the same protocol layers. This package provides the GUI; the CLI is also included.
